title: Association between traffic-related black carbon exposure and lung function among urban women.
ehr_evidence: No EHR mentioned; study used a prospective cohort with voluntary participants and specific lung function testing.
summary: A prospective urban community-based cohort study examining the relationship between long-term exposure to traffic-related black carbon (BC) and lung function among women of childbearing age in East Boston.
key_findings: Not provided in the truncated text.
population: Women of childbearing age in East Boston, Massachusetts
limitations: Text is truncated; study focuses on maternal lung function rather than pediatric outcomes.
